changeSet.author: investigator-ai
changeSet.comment: Initial schema: workspaces, users, investigation_sessions, audit_log

changeSet.author: investigator-ai
changeSet.sql: CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS audit_log_seq INCREMENT BY 1 NO MINVALUE NO MAXVALUE CACHE 1;

changeSet.author: investigator-ai
changeSet.comment: Align audit_log_seq with rows already inserted via BIGSERIAL
changeSet.sql: SELECT setval('audit_log_seq', GREATEST((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) FROM audit_log) + 1, 1), false);

changeSet.author: investigator-ai
changeSet.comment: Drop obsolete audit_log_seq — AuditLog now uses IDENTITY/BIGSERIAL
changeSet.rollback: CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS audit_log_seq INCREMENT BY 1 NO MINVALUE NO MAXVALUE CACHE 1;

changeSet.author: investigator-ai
changeSet.comment: Reset audit_log_id_seq past current max id
changeSet.sql: SELECT setval('audit_log_id_seq', GREATEST((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) FROM audit_log) + 1, 1), false);
